// src/pages/DashboardPage.js import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import { getSessions } from "../utils/firebase"; import "./DashboardPage.css"; function DonutChart({ percent }) { const value = Number(percent) || 0; const r = 44; const circ = 2 * Math.PI * r; const dash = (value / 100) * circ; return (
{value}%
); } function StreakDot({ done }) { return (
{done && ( )}
); } export default function DashboardPage({ navigate, user }) { const [sessions, setSessions] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { getSessions(20).then((data) => { setSessions(data || []); setLoading(false); }); }, []); const avg = (field) => { if (!sessions.length) return 0; return Math.round( sessions.reduce((acc, s) => acc + (Number(s.metrics?.[field]) || 0), 0) / sessions.length ); }; const displayName = user?.displayName || user?.email?.split("@")[0] || "Rolch"; const firstName = displayName.split(" ")[0]; const initials = displayName.slice(0, 2).toUpperCase(); const photoURL = user?.photoURL; const overallProgress = sessions.length ? avg("score") : 69; const streakDays = [true, true, true, true, true, true, false]; const streakCount = streakDays.filter(Boolean).length; const DAYS = ["M", "T", "W", "T", "F", "S", "S"]; return (
{photoURL ? : initials}
{displayName} Student
{loading ? (

Loading your dashboard…

) : (

Hello, {firstName}! 👋

Ready to speak with confidence today?

Start a Practice Session

Choose a scenario, record your speech, and get AI-powered feedback to improve.

≡
✦
✦
✦
💡

Tip of the day

Pause for effect. Short pauses help your ideas land and keep your listeners engaged.

Overall Progress

{overallProgress >= 80 ? "Excellent work!" : overallProgress >= 60 ? "You're doing great!" : "Keep it up!"}

Keep practicing to reach your goal.

Weekly Streak

🔥

{streakCount} days

Great consistency!

{DAYS.map((day, index) => (
{day}
))}
)}
); }
